description: Shanksville, Pennsylvania memorial to the 4th plane that crashed on 9/11
description_wiki: The Flight 93 National Memorial is a memorial built to commemorate the crash of United Airlines Flight 93, which was one of four aircraft hijacked during the September 11 attacks in 2001.

description: borough in Somerset County, Pennsylvania, United States
description_wiki: Shanksville is a borough in Somerset County, Pennsylvania, United States.

aliases: National National Parks ServicePark Service, NPS
National United States Parks ServicePark Service of the United States
description_wiki: The National Park Service (NPS) is an agency of the United States federal government, within the United States Department of the Interior.

description: former skyscraper complex in Manhattan, New York (1968-2001)
description_wiki: The original World Trade Center (WTC) was a complex of seven buildings in the Financial District of Lower Manhattan in New York City.
The September 11 attacks, colloquially known as 9/11, were a coordinated series of suicide attacks perpetrated by the Islamist terrorist organization al-Qaeda against the United States in 2001.

description: country retreat of the President of the United States
description_wiki: Camp David is a 125-acre (51-hectare) country retreat for the president of the United States.

description: type of emergency service dedicated to providing out-of-hospital acute medical care and transport to definitive care
description_wiki: Emergency medical services (EMS), also known as ambulance services, pre-hospital care, or paramedic services, are emergency services that provide urgent pre-hospital treatment and stabilisation for serious illness and injuries and transport to definitive care.
The United States Secret Service (USSS or Secret Service) is a federal law enforcement agency under the United States Department of Homeland Security.

description: protected area managed at the federated state level in some countries
description_wiki: State parks are parks or other protected areas managed at the sub-national level within those nations which use "state" as a political subdivision.

description: U.S. National Park system unit and historic district, in north-central Maryland
description_wiki: Catoctin Mountain Park is a park located in part of the Monocacy Valley and Catoctin Mountain ridge−range that forms the northeastern rampart of the Blue Ridge Mountains, in  the Appalachian Mountains System.

description: a department within the White House Office
description_wiki: The White House Military Office (WHMO) is a department within the White House Office that provides military support for White House functions, including presidential transportation, communications, medical support, food service, and hospitality.

aliases: United States Office of the White House Press Secretary
Office of the White House Press Secretary
description: information provider to the U.S. president, White House staff, and the media
